name: pass-2-architecture-split-decompose-prdtasksplitpanel
title: Pass-2 architecture split: decompose PrdTaskSplitPanel
description: Behavior-preserving decomposition of PrdTaskSplitPanel/index.tsx (4706 lines, 131 hooks) into bounded sub-modules using a leaves -> sections -> hooks staircase.
creator: xuning
notes: Closed at Phase 1 structural acceptance (M1-M14): 14 behavior-preserving milestones, 22 new modules, 22 new unit tests, 95/95 tests pass, 0 new tsc errors. index.tsx 4706 -> 3488 (-1218 lines, -25.9%). PRD strict AC of index.tsx <=500 lines NOT met -- the remaining 3488 lines are mostly orchestration state (~3050 lines of handlers + ~440 lines of left-card editor JSX) that requires custom-hook surgery to extract cleanly. Phase 2 deferred to follow-up task `pass-3-prdtasksplitpanel-taskcard-custom-hooks-continues-pass-2` (M15-M20 outlined: RequirementInputCard, useSplitRuntime, useTaskBoard, useSplitOrchestration, useRequirementBoard, final shell tightening). See prd.md for full milestone log + Phase 2 roadmap.
